May WOW @NSQ

Nearly 50 diverse and talented individuals. One purpose: shaping the future together. Together — we innovate, we inspire, we WOW.

This is a self-managed cohort directory. All information is sourced directly from SAP systems and LinkedIn data — no information has been assumed or generated. You are welcome to edit your own profile, add missing details, or request removal from this portal by opening your profile in Team Directory. For issues contact Alonso Cueva via Teams.

This is a self-managed cohort directory. All information is sourced directly from SAP systems and LinkedIn data — no information has been assumed or generated. You are welcome to edit your own profile, add any missing details, or request removal of your profile from this portal by clicking Edit on your card. For any issues or concerns with the page, please contact Alonso Cueva via Teams.
